zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Julia MacCarthy於1509年出生在愛爾蘭時，她的父親Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery39歲，母親Lady Eleanor FitzGerald36歲。她於大約1535年與Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1563年享年54歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克登波 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Julia MacCarthy于1509年出生在爱尔兰时，她的父亲Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery39岁，母亲Lady Eleanor FitzGerald36岁。她于大约1535年与Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1563年享年54岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克登波 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Julia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name   Julius .  A woman called Julia is mentioned in Paul's Epistle to the Romans (Romans 16:15), and the name was borne by numerous early saints. Its frequency increased with the vogue for classical names in the 18th century, and it continues to enjoy considerable popularity, although the recent introduction of   Julie   to the English-speaking world has reduced this somewhat. Well-known bearers include the British actress  Julia Foster  (  b. 1941 ) and American actress  Julia Roberts  (  b. 1967  as  Julie Fiona Roberts ).

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Julia MacCarthy was born in 1509, in Ireland, her father, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, was 39 and her mother, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, was 36. She married Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor about 1535, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1563, at the age of 54, and was buried in Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Julia MacCarthy est née en 1509, à Irlande, son père, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor environ 1535, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1563, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Julia MacCarthy 1509 in Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Eleanor FitzGerald 36. Sie hat um 1535 in Cork, County Cork, Irland Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1563 im Alter von 54 Jahren und wurde in Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Julia MacCarthy è nata il nel 1509 nel Irlanda, sua padre, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor circa 1535, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1563, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Julia MacCarthyが1509年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carberyは39歳，母Lady Eleanor FitzGeraldは36歳であった。約1535年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクでLord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Morと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1563年に54歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクダンボイ カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Julia MacCarthy(이)가 1509년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eleanor FitzGerald(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1535년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1563년 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 던보이 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Julia MacCarthy nasceu em 1509, em Irlanda, seu pai, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor aproximadamente 1535, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1563, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Julia MacCarthy родилась в 1509 г. в местности Ирландия, её отцу по имени Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor около 1535 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1563 г. в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности дунбои кастл, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Julia MacCarthy nació en 1509, en Irlanda, su papá, Donal MacCarthy Reagh 12th Prince of Carbery, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor FitzGerald, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor aproximadamente 1535, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1563, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda.
